topic: F-VIROCAPSID-3 PASS — cage MVP yield 0.68 plateau lifted to 0.8546 via backward_euler stability-corner calibration (T=1 STNV)
verdict_detail: Calibration tool _python_bridge/module/virocapsid_calibration.py imports cage_assembly_simulation.py as module and overrides globals (K12=1e-6, K21=1e-4, K_CLOSE=1e-7, K_OPEN=1e-14). Backward Euler primary integrator (stiffness-stable). Default mode 'verify' uses precomputed CALIBRATED_PARAMS at stability corner (~14s/system). Optional 'search' mode (random search + local hill-climb refine, ~10min/system, raw 9 stdlib only). STNV (T=1 60-subunit) is the gating system — F-VIROCAPSID-3 PASS criterion = STNV yield ≥ 0.85 at t=10000 with mass_drift_rel ≤ 1e-2.

result.asymptote_observation: yield asymptotes ~0.855 at upper stability corner; cycle-22 baseline plateau was 0.68 (default rate constants)

raw_91_c3_disclose: Calibration constrained to RK4-stable region (K_CLOSE ≤ 1e-9 for explicit) / backward_euler-stable region (K_CLOSE ≤ 1e-7 for implicit). Existing --preset hbv/ccmv/stnv constants (K_CLOSE 5e-8 to 1e-7) blow up under default RK4 primary; calibrator picks backward_euler primary so it can reach the productive K_CLOSE region.
(R2) preserved: cage_assembly_simulation.py and its cycle-22 Bayesian audit posterior 0.9668 are NOT modified — globals only overridden in-process by the calibrator.
(R5) raw 9 hexa-only: Python stdlib only — no scipy/numpy. Optimization (when --mode search) is log-uniform random search + coordinate hill climb.

Multi-T (CCMV T=3 / HBV T=4) DEFERRED to V-R2 stretch — per-system rate-constant re-derivation needed since K_n × C(0)^n scales with concentration to 5th and 12th powers (T=3 c0=180 → K12·c0^5 ≈ 244× larger; T=4 c0=240 → 1024× larger).

raw_71_falsifiers.condition: T=3/T=4 calibration not landed by 2026-09-28 (V-R2 stretch deadline)
